signals.headline: Bosnia-Herzegovina confirmed as Switzerland's Group B opponent at 2026 World Cup** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][4]
signals.raw:
Bosnia-Herzegovina confirmed as Switzerland's Group B opponent at 2026 World Cup** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][4]

Switzerland's Group B now finalized as Canada, Switzerland, Qatar, and Bosnia-Herzegovina after UEFA Playoff A resolution, completing the group stage draw announced earlier[1][4]. This recent confirmation—marking the field of 48 participants as complete—resolves prior uncertain
matched_markets: Will Switzerland win Group B in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, but fell short of market expectations of 2.4%, signaling contained price pressures amid global energy volatility.[1]  
Alternative sources report slightly lower figures at 2.16% YoY for March (C
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
